description: Verso: Fragment from the left side of an early Fatimid decree or other state document. The ends of three lines remain, including the word al-taqsīṭ. Reused on recto by Efrayim b. Shemarya to copy parts of Saʿadya Gaʾon's tafsīr (translation and commentary) on Genesis 1:3 - 1:15
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
